name: Rusted copper
description: Authored in Substance 3D Sampler, exported as an Unreal 4 PBR texture set (2026-07-18). Basecolor recompressed to JPEG; ORM and normal downsampled 2K to 1K. The export's Emissioncolor map is uniform white (Sampler exports the colour separately from a strength it does not export) and is deliberately omitted — shipped as-is it would make every surface glow. The Geometrydisplacement map is unused until a height channel exists.
